Transit access over driving, Better location over more space

What the user would change:
The user did not provide dislikes. Infer mostly from what they liked and keep uncertain dimensions neutral.

Source neighborhood: Logan Square, Chicago

Destination city: nyc

I liked being near bars, music venues, late-night food, and independent coffee shops. I did not need everything to be polished, but I wanted the area to feel active after work and easy to explore without driving.

Lifestyle cues they selected:
Good coffee, Nightlife, Public transit, Social energy, Great food

How the user likes to get around:
Public transport

What they want close by:
Coffee shops, Restaurants, Grocery shops, Public transport, Nightlife

Daily life and exploration notes:
Coffee, casual dinner, groceries, train access, and a few places to meet friends within a short walk.

Tradeoffs the user accepts:
Transit access over driving, Social energy over calm, Better location over more space

What the user would change:
The user did not provide dislikes. Infer mostly from what they liked and keep uncertain dimensions neutral.

Do not recommend, rank, or mention destination neighborhoods.

I liked mountain access, trails, bike paths, farmers markets, breweries, and a health-focused culture. I prefer calm streets and outdoor life over dense nightlife.

Parks nearby, Quiet streets, Good coffee, Groceries close

Bike friendly

What they want close by:
Parks, Grocery shops, Coffee shops, Gyms, Restaurants

Daily life and exploration notes:
Parks, trails, bike routes, grocery, cafes, fitness, and casual restaurants.

Tradeoffs the user accepts:
Quiet over nightlife, New adventure over familiar vibe

What the user would change:
The user did not provide dislikes. Infer mostly from what they liked and keep uncertain dimensions neutral.

{"task":"Calibrate neighborhood match scores. Be stricter than a cosine matcher. Penalize weak lifestyle, budget, mobility, or daily-routine fit. Transit access over driving, Better location over more space

What the user would change:
